prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Body mass index category: Normal
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.1 kg; Height 170.7 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 276mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 232mg/dL; 3 months ago 189mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.2kg; 9 months ago 63.9kg; 6 months ago 62.8kg; 3 months ago 63.1kg; current 62.1kg), Height (12 months ago 170.7cm; 9 months ago 170.7cm; 6 months ago 170.7cm; 3 months ago 170.7cm; current 170.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 874mg/g; 9 months ago 954mg/g; 6 months ago 1037mg/g; 3 months ago 839mg/g; current 818mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.63 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
